description: Product Description Do you like to see scratches and scuffs on the floor in your lovely home? Imagine that one sunny day You look at the wooden or laminate floor and see it was all covered with scratches by the seats and chairs. How much effort and money will You spend to remove these scratches? Felt furniture pads for hardwood floors X-PROTECTOR prevent the appearance of such problems in the future and protect wooden and laminated surfaces in Your home from scratches and scuffs! HIGH QUALITY – felt chair pads X-PROTECTOR are made of high-quality felt and give to Your floor, furniture, and other surfaces caring solid protection. TENACIOUS ADHESIVE - our chair leg floor protectors have a tenacious adhesive that tightly holds pads on the furniture for a long time. IT’S SUITABLE FOR ALL HEAVY FURNITURE – our wood floor protectors are perfect for Your chair, table, sofa, bed, recliner, ottoman, and other home furniture. MAIN ADVANTAGES OF OUR FURNITURE PADS X-PROTECTOR First of all, you need to clean the surface of the furniture feet. Then cutout size you need, peel the felt pad from the paper and stick it to the feet. MAIN ADVANTAGES OF OUR FURNITURE PADS X-PROTECTOR Our chair leg floor protectors has tenacious adhesive which tightly holds pads on the furniture feet for a long period of time. MAIN ADVANTAGES OF OUR FURNITURE PADS X-PROTECTOR Now no need to repair the damaged floor. Forget about scratches, scuffs and annoying noise when you move chairs and recliners with our felt furniture sliders. MAIN ADVANTAGES OF OUR FURNITURE PADS X-PROTECTOR X-PROTECTOR felt pads perfect for all type of floor: hardwood, laminate, vinyl, tile and others. ELIMINATE THE POSSIBILITY OF SCRATCHES WITH SUPER FELT FURNITURE PADS X-PROTECTOR!
